description: Kofi Asante (patient identifier: BAH000024) is a 35-year-old male presenting with fever for 4 days, chills, headache, and fatigue after returning from a rural farming area in Western Kenya. Access Bahmni at https://localhost/bahmni/home (login: superman / Admin123) to manage his clinical and laboratory workflow. Document an OPD encounter for the suspected malaria or typhoid fever and order laboratory investigations including a Full Blood Count (CBC) and a parasitological test (Malaria RDT or Blood Film). Record lab results indicating a positive malaria infection and include hemoglobin and white cell count in the CBC. Update the patient's record to a confirmed Malaria diagnosis and prescribe an appropriate antimalarial treatment such as Artemether-Lumefantrine, Artesunate, or Quinine.
